title: Qu’Appelle Coulee Provincial Ecological Reserve Regulations, E-0.01 Reg 3
text:
1
QU’APPELLE COULEE PROVINCIAL
ECOLOGICAL RESERVE E-0.01 REG 3
The
Qu’Appelle Coulee
Provincial Ecological
Reserve
Regulations
being
Chapter E-0.01 Reg 3
(effective September 4, 1991).
NOTE:
This consolidation is not official. Amendments have been
incorporated for convenience of reference and the original statutes
and regulations should be consulted for all purposes of interpretation
and application of the law. In order to preserve the integrity of the
original statutes and regulations, errors that may have appeared
are reproduced in this consolidation.

2
QU’APPELLE COULEE PROVINCIAL
E-0.01 REG 3 ECOLOGICAL RESERVE
CHAPTER E-0.01 REG 3
The Ecological Reserves Act
Title
1 These regulations may be cited as The Qu’Appelle Coulee Provincial Ecological
Reserve Regulations.
Ecological reserve designated
2 The land described in the Appendix to these regulations is designated as the
Qu’Appelle Coulee Provincial Ecological Reserve.
13 Sep 91 cE-0.01 Reg 3 s2.
Appendix
[Section 2]
QU’APPELLE COULEE PROVINCIAL ECOLOGICAL RESERVE
All of that land in and all mines and minerals within, upon or under the north-east
quarter of Section 15, in Township 18, in Range 10, West of the Second Meridian lying
to the west of the roadway shown on Plan of Record No. P 1272 in the Land Titles Office
for the Regina Land Registration District.
13 Sep 91 cE-0.01 Reg 3.
REGINA, SASKATCHEWAN
